quote: Small, steady choices are what make nutrition feel easy.
Build the plate you can repeat, not the one you can only admire.
Fresh food, calm tracking, and one good decision at a time.
Progress feels better when it is simple enough to repeat tomorrow.
A good day is just a collection of small, clear wins.
Your plan works best when it fits the life you actually live.
Eat with intention. Track with ease. Keep moving.
The healthiest routine is the one you can enjoy often.
